nl: Show all ERROR logs from the auth service in the last 1 hour
Show HTTP 500 errors from the payments service in the last 30 minutes
Find all logs with trace ID abc123
Show WARN and ERROR logs from any service in the last 2 hours
Find database connection errors in the last 15 minutes
kql: message: "connection refused" AND log.level: "ERROR" AND @timestamp >= now-15m

nl: Show all 4xx HTTP responses from the gateway service
Find requests where response time exceeded 5 seconds
Show all logs from the orders service since start of today
Find all production environment ERROR logs
Show logs where the message field contains timeout
Find orders that contain an item called laptop
Find orders with an item from the east warehouse and quantity greater than 3
Find orders containing a keyboard with at least 2 units
Find orders with fewer than 5 units of any item from the west warehouse
Show ERROR logs from the payments service with status code 500 in the last hour
kql: service.name: "payments" AND log.level: "ERROR" AND http.status_code: 500 AND @timestamp >= now-1h

nl: Find WARN logs from the orders service in the production environment
Show logs from the auth service with response time over 1000ms in the last 6 hours
Find ERROR logs from the gateway service that mention timeout
How many ERROR logs are there for each service?
Count the number of requests grouped by HTTP status code in the last 24 hours
How many logs were generated by each service in the production environment?
Count WARN and ERROR logs grouped by service for the last 7 days

Find requests with status codes between 502 and 504
Show client error responses from the gateway service
Find all 5xx errors from the orders service in the last hour
kql: service.name: "orders" AND http.status_code >= 500 AND http.status_code < 600 AND @timestamp >= now-1h
